description: Test cases for iOS form filling and data entry automation

evals.prompt: Fill out a login form on an iOS app with username 'john.doe@example.com' and password 'SecurePass123', then tap the login button
evals.expected_output:
Should successfully:
1. Call ui.inspect to find form fields
2. Call ui.input to fill username field with mode='replace'
3. Call ui.input to fill password field with mode='replace' and submit=true
4. Call ui.tap to tap login button
5. All operations should complete in under 1 second

evals.prompt: In an iOS settings screen, toggle the notifications switch ON, adjust the volume slider to 75%, and select the second segment in a segmented control
evals.expected_output:
Should successfully:
1. Call ui.inspect to get snapshot and element paths
2. Call ui.control.sendAction with event='valueChanged' for switch (no value needed)
3. Call ui.control.sendAction with event='valueChanged' and value=0.75 for slider
4. Call ui.control.sendAction with event='valueChanged' and value=1 for segment
5. All control actions should complete in ~10ms total (3-4ms each)

evals.prompt: Fill a multi-line text view in an iOS app with three lines of text: 'Line 1', 'Line 2', and 'Line 3', then dismiss the keyboard
evals.expected_output:
Should successfully:
1. Call ui.inspect to find UITextView element
2. Call ui.input with text='Line 1\nLine 2\nLine 3' and mode='replace'
3. Call ui.keyboard.dismiss to close keyboard
4. Response should show finalText with newlines preserved
5. Total time should be under 400ms (93ms input + 206ms dismiss)
